themes.exampleQuote: One of the widest tea selections I have ever seen.
A wonderfully large selection of teas from around the world, served in an intimate and quiet setting.
Staff is extremely friendly and knowledgeable about tea.
A wonderful pseudo-'third space' where you can sip tea, relax, play a board game, study, and talk to other patrons.
It's hard to get a seat sometimes because it's crowded.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers rave about the vast, worldly tea selection and cozy welcoming atmosphere that invites lingering, with the only consistent nitpick being that it can get crowded and seats are hard to come by.
notable_quote: If I could live there, I would!
